node.html: Developed APIs to read the page number of the uploaded handwritten documents by candidates using Optical Character Recognition with pytesseract.
The State of Charge (SoC) was estimated from the Battery Management System using a back-propagation neural network via a Beagle Bone Black controller.

Build a simple CNN model to classify the image categorization on dog v/s cat dataset. From the baseline models, various image augmentation techniques were used to improve the accuracy using transfer learning.
